must_detect.matched_text: Consideration: JPY 4,800,000,000 at JPY 960 per new share; no warrants or convertible securities; closing subject to customary adjustments.

Representations/Covenants: The issuer represents compliance with the APPI and internal My Number handling rules; no new stock options, dividends, or related-party transactions will be authorized before closing; privacy incident notices to the acquirer within 48 hours per DPA Schedule; this clause is policy-only and not triggered by any current incident.

Closing & Escrow: Expected closing date 2026-03-15, subject to satisfaction of conditions; 10% deposit to be held by Aome Trust Co., Ltd. as escrow agent; post-closing integration plan to be agreed within 30 days.

Closing & Escrow: Expected closing date 2026-03-15, subject to satisfaction of conditions; 10% deposit to be held by Aome Trust Co., Ltd. as escrow agent; post-closing integration plan to be agreed within 30 days.
Securities Matters: Shares will be issued via third-party allotment in accordance with issuer Articles; no public offering; no registration under foreign securities laws is contemplated or required.
